items.name: MLServer
items.description: An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more

items.name: Projects--Kaggle-
items.description: Collection of machine learning projects spanning healthcare prediction, business analytics, and NLP - built with Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.

items.name: SpliceML
items.description: Machine learning framework for mRNA alternative splicing analysis identifies a signature of progression in colorectal adenocarcinoma

items.name: A_Machine_Learning_and_Rule-Based_Approach_for_Data_Quality_Validation
items.description: A hybrid data quality framework integrating Pandera schema validation and unsupervised ML (Isolation Forest, DBSCAN and Local Outlier Factor) to secure traffic collision data. This modular pipeline automates geospatial and logical anomaly detection with 88.5% precision, delivering explainable reports via an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

items.name: TrackSelectorDNN
items.description: Machine Learning framework for training pixel track High-Purity online selection models for the Phase-2 High Level Trigger (HLT)

items.name: coevolutionary-episteme
items.description: A machine learning framework, dataset and research sub-module about coevolutionary planetary intelligence dynamics. This project explores how nurturing its emergent patterns may lead to a synergistic increase in the overall capability and intelligence of both individual agents and the collective system.

items.name: cognitive-valve
items.description: A machine learning dataset and architectural framework designed to address the crisis of cognitive overload in humans and language models considering current fast pace and high density of informational input, by establishing conceptual cognitive frames that align the entity with ecological sustainability and planetary symbiotic flourishing.

items.name: SCEgapfilled
items.description: A simple machine learning-based cloud gap-filling framework designed for fine-sclae snow cover mapping

items.name: ml-prediksi-gaji
items.description: untuk belajar tentang machine learning menggunakan framework fastapi dan dengan menerapkan algoritma regresi linier

items.name: TNBC_mutation_analysis
items.description: Source code and public data used for the project 'A machine learning framework for actionable genetic insights discovery: use in triple-negative breast cancer'.

items.name: NeuralNet
items.description: Machine Learning Accelerator utilizing High-Performance Distributed Processing, delivering Intelligent Scalable Real-Time Predictions via NeuralNetBoost Framework.

items.name: GRB-ML
items.description: Machine Learning-based framework for redshift estimation and cosmological parameter inference using Gamma-Ray Bursts as potential standard candles.

items.name: SwarmTorch
items.description: A distributed machine learning framework designed for real-world edge deployments where devices are resource-constrained, connections are unreliable and trust cannot be assumed. Built in Rust from the ground up, it brings swarm intelligence and federated learning primitives to environments where PyTorch and TensorFlow cannot operate.

items.name: AI-Driven-Telecom-Churn-Prediction-Using-Machine-Learning-and-Deep-Learning
items.description: End-to-End AI Framework for Telecom Customer Churn Prediction Using Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Intelligent Customer Segmentation

items.name: eddy-coherence-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework to identify and predict Lagrangian coherence of eddies in the Gulf of Mexico using ADT, SST, and chlorophyll-a. Improves classification and lifetime prediction of LCEs and LCFEs, with enhanced accuracy from Chl-a assimilation into ocean models

items.name: kmeans_nn_ILF_london_smart_meters
items.description: Kmeans-NN method for Individual Load Forecasting and online fault detection in smart meters, following the article: Tayseer, M., Talaat, M., Zamel, A.A. et al. "Cyber-resilient machine learning framework for accurate individual load forecasting and anomaly detection in smart grids", Nature, December 2025.

items.name: agriculture-advisory
items.description: Machine learning framework for crop recommendation and yield analysis using soil nutrients, climate features, and interpretable predictive models

items.name: nnpdf
items.description: An open-source machine learning framework for global analyses of parton distributions.

items.name: thrml-examples
items.description: THRML example notebooks — Void Framework empirical validation using Thermodynamic Representation of Machine Learning

items.name: jasmine
items.description: This C++ machine learning framework uses concepts, templates, and expression templates for efficient, modular neural network development. It supports matrix operations, layers (e.g., `weight_net_t`, `sigmoid_net_t`), optimizers (SGD, Adam, Nadam), and initialization methods (Xavier, He). Designed for performance and extensibility.

items.name: Predicting-Energy-Consumption
items.description: This project is a Campus Energy Consumption Forecasting Web Application that predicts future electricity usage based on historical energy data.  The system uses:  📊 Linear Regression (Machine Learning)  📈 ARIMA (Time Series Forecasting)  🌐 Flask (Backend Web Framework)  📁 CSV-based dataset input

items.name: Hydrogen-Hybrid
items.description: This repository contains the implementation of the hybrid machine-learning framework used in our work on hydrogen storage prediction in materials.

items.name: MLDL_Lab
items.description: A hands-on laboratory repository for practicing Machine Learning & Deep Learning concepts using Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and popular ML/DL frameworks.

items.name: JUSTNature-utils
items.description: Auxiliary mechanisms compiled as a machine learning toolkit for the long-term curation of the Monitoring and Evaluating framework.

items.name: brpc
items.description: brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

items.name: EnergyTradingProject
items.description: This repository provides a complete end-to-end framework for forecasting hourly intraday electricity prices on the Iberian market and converting these forecasts into systematic trading strategies. The project integrates data engineering, advanced machine-learning models, hyperparameter optimisation, and algorithmic trading mechanisms.

items.name: ytopt
items.description: ytopt: machine-learning-based autotuning and hyperparameter optimization framework using Bayesian Optimization

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: DRL_Production_Scheduling
items.description: Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for multi-machine production scheduling with A3C and DQN algorithms

items.name: SparseBank
items.description: SparseBank is a machine-learning–assisted framework for reducing matched-filter template banks. By learning the object masses it allows to significantly reduce the CBC templates that preserve detection sensitivity while significantly lowering computational cost.

items.name: tm-swarm
items.description: A Python framework for N-agent collective learning using Tsetlin Machines and synthetic data sharing, supporting zero-shot sensor onboarding and LLM-driven feature extraction.

items.name: 2D-airfoil-flow-drag-optimization-via-CFD-ML-integration
items.description: A modular framework integrating CFD and machine learning for airfoil flow analysis and drag optimization.

items.name: XAI-SFCB-Bond-Strength-Predictor
items.description: A machine learning framework and PyQt6 GUI for predicting the bond strength between Steel-FRP Composite Bars (SFCB) and concrete, featuring Genetic Algorithm (GA) optimization and SHAP-based Explainable AI (XAI).

items.name: DevQCC
items.description: DevQCC is the backend code for the paper DevQCC: Device-Aware Quantum Circuit Cutting Framework with Applications in Quantum Machine Learning.

items.name: SDN-SmartGuard-ML
items.description: Framework de Rede Definida por Software (SDN) com monitoramento inteligente via Machine Learning (Isolation Forest). Automatização de fluxos OpenFlow para detecção de anomalias e redução de custos em infraestruturas de TIC utilizando Ryu Controller e Mininet.

items.name: DTI-Predictor
items.description: This is my final year project where I use machine learning to predict the binding success rate between drug molecules and protein targets. I will code the frontend off of the react framework and use a REST API to connect it to the backend - Neural network, Database

items.name: BACKEND
items.description: This repo contains BACKEND concepts and projects using different BACKEND frameworks like Express and FAST API. We will cover FAST API generally and also especially  machine learning that how we will make APIs for machine learning models.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: machine-learning
items.description: This repository explores Machine Learning through projects, scripts, and tutorials. It covers data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and deployment using frameworks like scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, with applications in classification, regression, NLP, and computer vision.

items.name: heat
items.description: Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python

items.name: tenflowers
items.description: A pure Rust implementation of TensorFlow, providing a full-featured machine learning framework with Rust's safety and performance.

items.name: FinScore-Alternative-Credit-Scoring
items.description: A machine learning framework to predict loan default risk using alternative borrower data, designed for underserved financial segments.

items.name: Feasibility-Aware-ML-Energy-Materials
items.description: Feasibility-aware analysis of latent representations learned by multitask machine-learning models for electrochemical energy materials. The framework reveals domain structure, transferability limits, and data-supported performance regimes across porous carbons and MOFs.

items.name: KNN-Based-Machine-Learning-for-Motion-Sensor-Signal-Classification
items.description: KNN-based machine learning framework for classification and recognition of motion sensor time-series data from wearable sensors, enabling efficient and interpretable motion pattern identification for smart sensing and human–machine interface applications.

items.name: pac_learning
items.description: probably approximately correct (PAC) learning is a framework for mathematical analysis of machine learning

items.name: carbon-foam-ml-predictor
items.description: This is a machine learning framework for predicting compressive strength of carbon foams using ensemble regression (Random Forest + XGBoost) with interactive Streamlit deployment.

items.name: FedEasy
items.description: FedEasy is an intuitive powerful yet simple to use Federated Learning framework. Our goal is to streamline the process of setting up and running federated learning experiments with ease, making advanced machine learning techniques accessible to researchers and developers alike.

items.name: Face-Recognition-using-Python-Django-and-React
items.description: This repository contains a full-stack web application designed for Face Recognition. It is built using **React** for the user interface, **Django REST Framework** for the backend API, and **OpenCV** + **Machine Learning** models for the core face recognition capabilities.

items.name: gospel
items.description: Framework  for comprehensive variant detection in whole genome sequences using advanced machine learning models for cross domain pattern recognition in fitness, pharmacogenetics and nutritional aspects of sprint running

items.name: leakproof-ml
items.description: Github repository for the leakproof-ml tool. Also, contains as use example the results of the paper: "Leakproof ML: Data Leakage Prevention with a Robust, Interpretable, and Reproducible Machine Learning Framework"

items.name: opifex
items.description: A unified scientific machine learning framework built on JAX/Flax NNX

items.name: Minerva
items.description: Minerva is a framework for training machine learning models for researchers.

items.name: NeuroKinematics
items.description: Machine learning–based inverse kinematics pipeline for robotic manipulators. The project uses neural networks, forward kinematics–aware loss functions, and joint constraints to predict joint angles from end-effector poses. Designed as a modular and research-oriented framework.

items.name: psa-spc-dm
items.description: A machine learning-based framework to distinguish nuclear recoils from electronic backgrounds in gaseous NEWS-G-style detectors.

items.name: nova
items.description: NOVA is a tool for annotating and analyzing behaviours in social interactions. It supports Annotators using Machine Learning already during the coding process. Further it features both, discrete labels and continuous scores and a visuzalization of streams recorded with the SSI Framework.

items.name: AI---Driven-calculated-bandgap-datacuration-in-materials-Project-based-onknown-experimental-data
items.description: Machine learning framework to predict inorganic band gaps

items.name: HLSFactory
items.description: HLSFactory: A Framework Empowering High-Level Synthesis Datasets for Machine Learning and Beyond

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: ppmi-ontology-alignment
items.description: Framework for aligning longitudinal Parkinson’s Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) data with the Parkinson’s Disease Ontology (PDON) and Movement Disorder Ontology (PMDO). Provides reproducible mapping, ontology instantiation, and ontology-informed machine learning workflows for analysing Parkinson’s disease trajectories.

items.name: AI-Image-Detection
items.description: AI-Image-Detection is a machine learning project that identifies and classifies images using deep learning techniques. It supports training, testing, and real-time prediction with high accuracy. Built with Python and modern AI frameworks, it provides a scalable solution for automated image analysis and intelligent visual recognition applications.

items.name: geothermal-seismic-prediction
items.description: Predictive "Traffic Light System" for Induced Seismicity using Physics-Informed Machine Learning. > Engineered a Random Forest model to forecast seismic events ($M > 0.5$) at a geothermal plant. Achieved 73% recall using a hybrid temporal modeling framework. Translating geomechanical theory into actionable safety alerts.

items.name: Forest-fire-prediction
items.description: Forest Fire Prediction is a Supervised Machine learning problem statements. Using Regression and Classification Algorithm, Regression and Classification Model is build that detected future fires based on certain Weather report.  A framework is created using Flask and deployed on Render

items.name: CircumSpectrum
items.description: CircumSpectrum is a flux-based framework that converts bulk and single-cell RNA-seq data into metabolic fingerprints using genome-scale models and machine learning. It includes RADAR, SOURIS, and CORALIE modules for reaction-level, cross-cohort, and multi-tier correlation analyses.

items.name: PROJECT
items.description: This repository showcases my journey in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Computer Vision — from data preprocessing and model training to real-time deployment using FastAPI, OpenCV, and modern ML frameworks. Each project is built with a focus on performance, explainability, and real-world applicability.

items.name: atlas-dataflow
items.description: Atlas DataFlow é um framework contrato-driven para construção de pipelines analíticos modulares, auditáveis e adaptáveis. Organiza o fluxo de dados em etapas orientadas a domínio, promovendo rastreabilidade, reprodutibilidade e integração consistente entre análise de dados, modelagem estatística e aplicações de machine learning.

items.name: apax
items.description: A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.

items.name: Clinical-AI-QA-Framework
items.description: Automated QA framework for machine learning models in medical imaging

items.name: specialized-nmt-framework
items.description: Multi-Stage Domain Adaptation for Neural Machine Translation: A Hybrid Learning Framework for Specialized Terminology and Low-Resource Language Pairs

items.name: heart-signal-arrhythmia-analysis
items.description: A machine learning and deep learning framework for arrhythmia detection and classification using ECG and PPG signals.

items.name: gomlx
items.description: GoMLX: An Accelerated Machine Learning Framework For Go

items.name: PhaseLearner
items.description: PhaseLearner is a modular machine-learning framework for extracting phase structure from many-body simulation data. Designed for DQMC and lattice models, it implements dimensionality reduction, latent-space analysis, and physics-informed deep learning models to locate critical parameters, identify symmetry breaking, and characterize emergent order.

items.name: Explainable-BERT-and-machine-learning-model-for-phishing-email-and-malicious-URL-detection
items.description: An explainable hybrid phishing detection framework combining BERT-based transformers with machine learning models to detect phishing emails and malicious URLs. It leverages deep contextual text features and interpretable ML techniques to achieve high accuracy and transparent predictions for real-world cybersecurity use.

items.name: Hybrid-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Portfolio-Optimisation-on-Stocks-in-the-US-Markets-
items.description: Will be conducting Portfolio Optimisation based on set asset universe and will be using Machine Learning Techniques to do so.

items.name: fastapi-vss
items.description: RESTful API for vector similarity search using the Python web framework FastAPI and a REDIS vector database.  This accelerates machine learning workflows that require vector similarity search using classification models.

items.name: SJWP_Research
items.description: Vibro-acoustic simulation and machine learning framework for non-invasive water leak detection in urban plumbing systems. Developed for SJWP India.

items.name: TransBoundary-Air-Intelligence-ML-GIS
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning and GIS framework for modelling and mapping transboundary air pollution influence across countries (2016–2024).

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.name: ModelComparer
items.description: A machine learning experimentation framework that allows users to train, compare, and ensemble multiple classification and regression models on CSV datasets

items.name: MultiScaleArrays.jl
items.description: A framework for developing multi-scale arrays for use in scientific machine learning (SciML) simulations

items.name: pamiq-core
items.description: Framework for building AI agents with real-time adaptive learning capabilities.

items.name: APLR-interpretable-ML
items.description: A reusable APLR-powered interpretable machine learning framework for binary classification with built-in explainability

items.name: ASLVizNet-Sign_Language_Recognition_Using_Convolutional_Neural_Networks_in_Machine_Learning
items.description: Research-grade ASL recognition framework using CNN, SSD MobileNet v2, and TensorFlow Object Detection API for real-time gesture detection.

items.name: UIRS
items.description: Unified digital framework aimed at transforming citizen-generated data into actionable municipal intelligence. The system integrates machine learning techniques for automated issue classification, trend prediction, and anomaly detection, enabling authorities to proactively identify recurring urban issues before they escalate.

items.name: LNG-Regasification-Plant-Optimization
items.description: This master's thesis presents a comprehensive machine learning framework for optimizing LNG regasification process plant in Nigeria.

items.name: ai_fraud_detection
items.description: A fraud detection framework using Generative AI (GenAI) and unsupervised machine learning to identify suspicious patterns in financial transactions.

items.name: folax
items.description: Folax (Finite Operator Learning with JAX) is a framework for solving and optimizing PDEs by integrating machine learning with numerical methods in computational mechanics.

items.name: anvil
items.description: Anvil is a high-performance machine learning framework written in Rust, designed from the ground up for speed, parallelism, and control.

items.name: A-Decentralized-Framework-for-AI-based-Resource-Allocation-in-Open-RAN
items.description: A decentralized framework for AI-based resource allocation in Open RAN optimizes network efficiency. It uses machine learning models, deployed at the network edge, to autonomously manage resources like spectrum and power, enhancing performance and scalability without a central controller.

items.name: AI4SG_UseCaseAssessment
items.description: Interactive assessment framework for scoping AI, machine learning and data science projects for social good organizations.

items.name: BioGraphX
items.description: BioGraphX is a comprehensive framework for extracting biophysical features from protein sequences using graph-theoretical approaches. The system models proteins as interaction networks where residues form nodes and biochemical interactions form edges, enabling sophisticated feature extraction for downstream machine learning applications

items.name: spacecraft-propulsion-phm
items.description: A Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) framework for spacecraft propulsion systems using high-frequency sensor data and machine learning for multi-class fault diagnosis.

items.name: mlops-automation-framework
items.description: A general-purpose, domain-agnostic MLOps framework that automates the complete machine learning lifecycle from data versioning to model deployment and monitoring. Built with open-source tools to avoid vendor lock-in and enable reproducible ML workflows.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Service-for-Farm-Pro
items.description: This is a machine learning service for the Farm Pro system based on fastapi framework.

items.name: machinelearning
items.description: ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

items.name: sentinelcam
items.description: A computer vision and machine learning pipeline on a distributed framework. Designed for an embedded network on low voltage IoT hardware.

items.name: AI-Assisted-Web-Application-Vulnerability-Detection-and-False-Positive-Reduction-Framework
items.description: This project develops an AI-assisted security testing framework that enhances web application vulnerability scanning. It uses Burp Suite to detect common vulnerabilities and applies a machine learning model to classify results as true or false positives, reducing false alarms and improving detection accuracy.

items.name: STRADA-traffic-risk-analysis-project
items.description: Machine learning framework for traffic risk prediction and reliability-aware safety interpretation using large-scale accident data.
